basic_details.job_title: JMI Post Graduate Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 19 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jamia Millia Islamia (JMI) Guest Teachers Notification 2026 has been released on the official website Jamia Millia Islamia. A total of 19 vacancies have been announced through the JMI Guest Teachers Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree + B.Ed. for PGT, Bachelor’s Degree + B.Ed. + CTET Paper II for most TGT, Relevant subject expertise, Urdu knowledge desirable
qualification.details: PGT Physics: Master’s in Physics / Electronics / Applied Physics / Nuclear Physics (≥50%) + B.Ed. PGT History: Master’s in History (≥50%) + B.Ed. PGT English: Master’s in English (≥50%) + studied at graduation + B.Ed. PGT Commerce: M.Com (≥50%) – M.Com in Applied/Business Economics not eligible + studied Commerce at graduation + B.Ed. PGT Urdu: Master’s in Urdu (≥50%) + studied at graduation + B.Ed. PGT Computer Science: M.Sc.(CS/IT) / MCA / M.E./M.Tech (CS/IT) (≥50%) + B.Ed. or integrated B.Ed.M.Ed or 4-year integrated degree. PGT Political Science: Master’s in Pol. Science (≥50%) or integrated PG + B.Ed. TGT Geography: Bachelor’s / Honours (≥50%) in relevant subject + B.Ed. (or integrated) + CTET Paper II. TGT History: Bachelor’s / Honours (≥50%) in relevant subject + B.Ed. (or integrated) + CTET Paper II. TGT Political Science: Bachelor’s / Honours (≥50%) in relevant subject + B.Ed. (or integrated) + CTET Paper II. TGT Science with Biology: Bachelor’s / Honours (≥50%) in relevant subject + B.Ed. (or integrated) + CTET Paper II. TGT Mathematics: Bachelor’s / Honours (≥50%) in relevant subject + B.Ed. (or integrated) + CTET Paper II. TGT Hindi & Hindu Ethics: Bachelor’s with Hindi Literature (≥50%) + Philosophy / Sanskrit / History + B.Ed. + CTET Paper II. TGT Urdu: Bachelor’s / Honours (≥50%) in relevant subject + B.Ed. (or integrated) + CTET Paper II. TGT (IT/Computer): BCA / B.Sc. (CS) (≥50%) or Graduation + PGDCA / A-Level DOEACC. Music Teacher: 10+2 (≥50%) + Bachelor’s Degree in Music/Performing Arts (Music as main subject). Special Educator: Graduation (≥50%) + B.Ed. Special Education / equivalent + CTET Paper II + RCI registration.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JMI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.jmi.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JMI Guest Teachers posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the JMI Guest Teachers posts is 12-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Guest Teachers at JMI?
faq.answer: There are a total of 19 vacancies available for Guest Teachers at Jamia Millia Islamia.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for PGT posts?
faq.answer: For PGT posts, candidates generally need a Master’s Degree in the relevant subject along with a B.Ed. degree.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for TGT posts?
faq.answer: For TGT posts, candidates typically need a Bachelor’s Degree in the relevant subject, a B.Ed. degree, and CTET Paper II.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for JMI Guest Teachers recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for Guest Teachers at JMI?
faq.answer: The salary for Guest Teachers is offered on a pay-per-period basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be found on the official website of Jamia Millia Islamia (JMI).

faq.question: Q10. What is the address for sending the offline application?
faq.answer: The specific address for sending the offline application is mentioned in the official notification PDF.
